title: Aging In Place Consulting
metaTitle: Aging-In-Place Marketing Strategies and Products - 1 Day Course
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling offers a 1 day course on building your own Aging In Place business.
subtitle: A One-Day Seminar Focused on Aging-In-Place Marketing Strategies and Products
content: We have operated for 18 years as a pioneer in the aging-in-place market. The aging-in-place market is just beginning to see real growth with the demographic expansion among Americans aged 55+.

We have consulted nationwide with individual entrepreneurs and major retailers. Our consulting will explain the many potential avenues available within the aging-in-place market, so you can make the best choice.
formats: One-day, 6-hour seminars (virtual via Zoom or in-person)
